<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please keep changes focused. -->

## Summary

What does this change, and why?

## Related issue / ADR

Closes #... (and reference any relevant ADR)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build` passes (warnings are errors)
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] If a UI string key changed, updated all localization languages
- [ ] No build output (`bin/`, `obj/`, `publish/`) committed
